overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment at night. The character transitions from an outdoor sidewalk under an overpass into a covered commercial plaza with large digital billboards and reflective floors, stopping briefly to use a device before continuing through the corridor.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the overpass alongside a male pedestrian in a blue shirt

notable_agents.action: male in blue shirt walking ahead at same pace

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass spanning the road ahead
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and signage
multi-lane road with sparse vehicle traffic visible
illuminated bollard-style street lamp with white glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a massive concrete overpass at night, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible to the left and a road with light traffic to the right. The sidewalk is concrete and the area is partially covered by the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition plaza between street and covered corridor

events.description: character turns right at corner of building, leaving the roadside sidewalk
enters covered commercial plaza with reflective flooring and digital displays

agents.ego_description: turning right at the building corner and walking toward the illuminated plaza entrance

entered.detail: dark smooth wall of adjacent building with horizontal light strips
metal and glass escalator leading to upper level of plaza
highly polished tile floor reflecting the neon ceiling lights
modern concrete seating along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns right away from the main road and enters a transitional plaza area with reflective tiled flooring. The space features modern concrete benches and a visible escalator structure ahead, with the environment becoming more enclosed and artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit corridor passing large digital billboards on the left wall

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking toward the camera in the corridor

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying '3 MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' with graphic imagery
long linear cyan and yellow neon light strips running the length of the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking through a long covered corridor with highly reflective marble floors and vibrant neon ceiling lights. The left wall features massive digital billboards including one for '3 MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' while the escalator structure remains visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area under color-changing neon ceiling

events.description: character stops walking and turns to face the camera, appearing to use a handheld device
ceiling neon lights shift from cyan to pink to green, illuminating the scene with changing colors

agents.ego_description: stopped and standing with arms crossed, looking at a device while the camera circles slightly around the character

notable_agents.action: person descending the escalator in the background

entered.detail: overhead light panels cycling through cyan, pink, and green colors
illuminated yellow vending kiosks against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character stops in an open plaza area beneath color-changing neon ceiling panels that shift between cyan, pink, and green hues. Having turned to face the camera, the character interacts with a device while the background reveals the escalator structure now on the left and illuminated vending machines on the right.

events.description: character turns and resumes walking away from camera down the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking away from camera past large food advertisements and ascending stairs structure

entered.detail: large colorful advertisement for 'EXPLOSION OF TASTE' with graphic food imagery
metal and concrete staircase leading to upper level with neon trim

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking through the corridor, passing a vibrant 'EXPLOSION OF TASTE' billboard on the left. The environment features the same reflective flooring and neon ceiling lights, with a staircase structure now visible on the right side as the character moves deeper into the commercial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty urban overpass into a polished, neon-drenched commercial complex. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, flanked by distant skyscrapers and light traffic, before turning away from the road into a transitional plaza with reflective tiled flooring. As the character moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting into a long corridor of marble floors and vibrant ceiling lights where massive digital billboards line the walls. The scene then opens into a plaza beneath color-changing neon panels that shift between cyan, pink, and green, where the character pauses to interact with a device amidst illuminated vending machines. Finally, the camera follows the character as they resume their walk deeper into the complex, passing a vivid advertisement for an explosion of taste while a staircase structure emerges on the right.
